approved_command_preview: Discovery/proposal-only Wave 2 scan. Reads Airtable schema and records via DCOIR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN/DCOIR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID, classifies all live tables for WBS22 Wave 2, collects before metrics, identifies status/review/retention/pointer candidates, and writes JSON/MD artifacts only. No Airtable writes, no deletes, no schema changes, no GitHub/source/skill/workflow changes.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
if (-not $downloads) { $downloads = Join-Path $repo 'chatgpt_exec_outputs' }
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $downloads | Out-Null
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs22_wave2_discovery_20260508'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$scriptPath = Join-Path $outDir 'wbs22_wave2_discovery.ps1'
@'
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$token = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN','Machine')
$baseId = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID','Machine')
$outDir = $env:WBS22_WAVE2_OUTDIR
if (-not $token) { throw 'Missing DCOIR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN' }
if (-not $baseId) { throw 'Missing DCOIR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID' }
if (-not $outDir) { throw 'Missing WBS22_WAVE2_OUTDIR' }
$headers = @{ Authorization =
